Kelin's Lucid Lullaby  

Description

1: Mesmerize (1/30)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 0 Skill: Stringed
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 0
Fizzle Time: 0 Resist: Magic
Range: 100 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 3
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel quite drowsy.
Cast on other: Soandso 's head nods.
Effect Fades: You no longer feel sleepy.

Game Description

A quiet lullaby that causes your target to fall into an enchanted sleep. Affects creatures up to level @1.

Items with this effect

  • Song: Kelin's Lucid Lullaby

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Song: Kelin's Lucid Lullaby
ClassLevel
BRD15
Expansion:

Duration:
3 ticks
  • Comments (10)
  • Sold By (3)
  • Quested (0)

Add Image

    Greater Faydark
    • Serilia Whistlewind - 7gp 4sp 7cp

    Shar Vahl

    The Plane of Knowledge

    Post Comment
    Quick Question
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 21 2008 at 6:30 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592779780890
    3 posts
    I am completely new to bards, and was curious about how this spell works.

    After I target and cast(or sing, whatever) do i have to keep that specific mob targeted to keep him mezzed or can i move on and mez another?
    ▲ Page top
    Another Vendor
    QuoteReply
    # Dec 29 2003 at 10:19 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591783656467
    107 posts
    This song can be purchased in the Bard Guild in North Freeport from Serilia Whistlewind. Hope this helps.

    Tatianya Chernyenko
    Bard of the 30th Verse
    E'ci

    I got it at the bard guild in shar val i think i saw it in the PoK library too.
    ▲ Page top
    Is this a former AE song?
    QuoteReply
    # Apr 03 2003 at 5:55 AM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1592257400249
    51 posts
    I read on EQDiva that this was an AE song. LOL! That must have been some time ago... Never works on more than one mob at a time with me.

    ▲ Page top
    Is this a former AE song?
    QuoteReply
    # Sep 22 2007 at 10:47 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592278505390
    Scholar
    20 posts
    Here's the REAL story of the former AE mez...

    In beta it was super overpowered. It could lock down an entire zone. This caused all bard mez songs to have a second resist check added. Essentially, the song could land but not affect the creature. This led to the supremacy of Enchanters in crowd controlling (and monks in pulling, as a bard's only tool for controlling a lull failure was removed).

    Bards complained bitterly about this state of affairs, while Verant denied there was any problem. This came to a head in a famous (among bards at least) episode where a dev came to watch a demonstration in the Qeynos newbie yard as a high level bard attempted to mez the level 1 snakes, only to have a near 100% resist rate.

    Eventually the second resist check was removed, and this song changed to single target.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Is this a former AE song?
    QuoteReply
    # Jul 07 2003 at 2:47 AM Rating: Default
    __DEL__1591750246078
    Scholar
    312 posts
    This use to be an AE back around with Luclin came out. Shortly after it was changed to a single target mez, probably because the AE version got alot of resists.
    ▲ Page top
    RE: Is this a former AE song?
    QuoteReply
    # Feb 18 2004 at 1:18 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1591791517418
    30 posts
    I started a Wood Elf Bard with all points and gear towards Charisma. I got maybe 1 or 2 resist on this song when it was AE. When luclin came out, I recreated my bard as a Vah Shir with all points and gear towards Dex. I had so many resist with that song I stopped memming it. But with high charisma, this song was perfect! I was very upset when they made it targetable. I would like them to keep all the single target ones, but make this one back to AE. I have high charisma now, due to I hate missing notes, and I love to charm.
